Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    MsgPack
    Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by MsgPackSerializer and MsgPackParser.
    MsgPackAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @MsgPack annotation.
    MsgPackAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    MsgPackApply
    Dynamically applies a @MsgPack annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    MsgPackApply.Array
    A collection of @MsgPackApply annotations.
    MsgPackApplyAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @MsgPackApply annotation.
    MsgPackApplyAnnotation.Applier
    Applies targeted MsgPackApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
    MsgPackApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    MsgPackBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the MessagePack serializers and parsers pulled from the @MsgPack annotation on the bean property.
    MsgPackClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the MessagePack serializers and parsers pulled from the @MsgPack annotation on the class.
    MsgPackConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in MsgPackSerializer and MsgPackParser.
    MsgPackConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @MsgPackConfig annotation.
    MsgPackConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
    Applies MsgPackConfig annotations to a MsgPackParser.Builder.
    MsgPackConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
    Applies MsgPackConfig annotations to a MsgPackSerializer.Builder.
    MsgPackInputStream
    Specialized input stream for parsing MessagePack streams.
    MsgPackMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to MsgPackClassMeta and MsgPackBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    MsgPackOutputStream
    Specialized output stream for serializing MessagePack streams.
    MsgPackParser
    Parses a MessagePack stream into a POJO model.
    MsgPackParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    MsgPackParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    MsgPackParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
    MsgPackParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MsgPackParser.
    MsgPackParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    MsgPackSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to MessagePack.
    MsgPackSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
    MsgPackSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    MsgPackSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.
    MsgPackSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MsgPackSerializer.
    MsgPackSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    MsgPackTokenReader
    Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the MessagePack format.
    MsgPackTokenWriter
    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the MessagePack format.
    MsgPackTokenWriter.Settings
    Cursor-level settings honored by MsgPackTokenWriter.
